title: Cynorkis pulchra
intro: Cynorkis pulchra, commonly known as the 'beautiful orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cynorkis pulchra include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which have been found to possess antioxidant, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory activities. In traditional medicine, Cynorkis pulchra is often prepared as a decoction or infusions to treat various ailments, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and extracts.
